name: Media Buying & PPC
tagline: Paid media that converts, not just clicks.
description: We run Google Ads, Meta Ads, and beyond for your clients, fully managed, performance-focused, and reported in a way that makes you look like the expert. Every campaign starts with a clear revenue goal.

deliverables.title: Campaign Strategy
deliverables.description: Audience analysis, channel selection, budget allocation, and a clear conversion goal before a single dollar is spent.

deliverables.title: Ad Creative
deliverables.description: Copy and visual assets for each ad format: search ads, display, social. Built for the platform and the audience.

deliverables.title: Campaign Setup & Launch
deliverables.description: Full account structure, tracking setup, conversion events, and UTM parameters, built to measure what matters.

deliverables.title: Audience Targeting & Segmentation
deliverables.description: Custom audiences, lookalikes, retargeting, and exclusion lists for precision targeting that respects budget.

deliverables.title: Ongoing Optimisation
deliverables.description: Weekly bid adjustments, negative keyword pruning, A/B testing, and budget reallocation toward what's converting.

deliverables.title: Performance Reporting
deliverables.description: Monthly reports covering spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, CPA, and ROAS, white-labelled for your client.

whyUs.title: Revenue-focused, not vanity-metric focused
whyUs.description: We optimize for conversions and cost-per-acquisition, not impressions and click-through rates that look good on a slide but don't pay your client's rent.

whyUs.title: Platform-flexible
whyUs.description: Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, wherever your client's audience is. We don't push a platform because we have a preferred tool.

whyUs.title: No agency markup on ad spend
whyUs.description: Our fee is for management. Every dollar of your client's ad budget goes to the platform, not into our margin.

faq.question: What ad platforms do you manage?
faq.answer: Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max), Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram), LinkedIn, and TikTok. We'll recommend the right mix based on your client's audience and budget.

faq.question: What's the minimum ad budget you'd recommend?
faq.answer: For meaningful data and results, we'd recommend a minimum monthly ad spend of $1,500. Below that, the algorithms don't get enough signal to optimize. We'll advise on this during the discovery call.

faq.question: Do you create the ad creatives?
faq.answer: Yes, copy and static visuals are included. For video creative, we'll either work from existing assets you provide or advise on production if needed.

faq.question: How do you handle the client's ad account?
faq.answer: We work inside your client's ad account (or one set up in their name). All spend and history stays with them. They own it, we run it.
